itemListElement.reviewBody: worst school worst faculty had my worst experience for class 10...... senior teachers are very rude and egoistic.....haven't seen a microscope in class 10 due to the ego of bio lab teacher ...some teachers are nice but majority of them don't teach in class and are more busy in bothering in others personal life 🙃 i dont even want to rate this school 1 star

itemListElement.reviewBody: I would give this five stars because I still go in this school  I heard a lot of u say bad things but now the school has developed the teachers are very nice the teachers to class lkg ang 5th are very nice but after they get strict but just a tiny bit but I think the teachers should stay like this only they always help in any problems but they should not scold children for doing smt bad they should tell them the nice way if they don't they can act strict but overall I love this school

itemReviewed.name: Holy Angels Secondary School - Sector 3,Rajendra Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I don’t want to give even 1 star to this school. But I would like to share something which is very important. I always dream that whenever my child grown up  I sent her in icsce school bcz of best education and I chose this school. It was a last year incident when I went for admission in lkg for my kid . They immediately give admission to my kid and they always force me to fill all the fees and admission fees n all. I gave all fees to them but due to covid we all know our child doesn’t get any offline class which had affected to their study so due to this concern , I explained them that I’ll give all extra fees to u but if she didn’t get pass in kg then can we again repeat the same class . But they said no we terminate ur child . I told one of her teacher that can u provide some extra tuitions to my child but they denied me and said “it’s ur child ur problem”.Are u serious guys I gave around 70K to u and u told me that u guys terminate my child if she will fail. So for what I gave u this much amount to waste my kid’s year . Now I am very glad that I took a good decision that time and leave ur school. Now my child gets good education and even though very very good grades in her class . Please don’t send ur ward in this school this school lost their reputation and prestige . Many of the teachers are very rude so many incidents happened with me . What should I tell u don’t know

itemReviewed.name: Holy Angels Secondary School - Sector 3,Rajendra Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I don’t want to give even 1 star to this school. But I would like to share something which is very important. I always dream that whenever my child grown up  I sent her in icsce school bcz of best education and when she grew I chose this school bcz it’s very near to my house. It was a last year incident when my kid got admission in lkg. They immediately give admission to my kid and was almost forcing me to fill all fees along with admission charges n all. May be they are in hurry because they get less admissions due to covid. BTW I gave all fees to them immediately but we all know our children didn’t get any classes properly since last 2 years due to pandemic which affects to their studies, I explained her class teacher that she is not able to study in online classes so could u please give her Tutions I’ll pay for that also . She denied and said “ ni madam apka child apko khud dekhna padega” I told her that we are working parents can’t give her proper attention but still she said no. Then we met Father & explained them that what if my child fails in this class ? Can we again go for re-admission in the same class ? I’ll pay all year fees again to u guyz (bcz as a parent I thought may be my chid fails due to less attention 50-50 chances are there, but I am okay with this , After all it’s my dream school) , so I am ready to pay again.

But , they said no …sorry ….we will terminate ur child . I was shocked 😳
Are u serious guys I gave around 70K to u and u told me that u guys terminate my child if she will fail. You guys don’t even say that  “don’t worry Maam we will take responsibility of your child”It’s our job . Oh my god , u guyz are very greedy . U were so polite at the time of admission and after that u left us like hell. So for what I gave u 70k to waste my kid’s year ? Now I am very glad that I took a right decision that time and leave ur school.
Edit: Now my child gets good education in Khaitan public School even she get very good grades in her class. They motivates me & take all responsibility of my child . Please don’t send ur ward in this school this school lost their reputation and prestige . Teachers are very rude now a days .
